allow: Bash(sqlite3 /Users/astroid/Desktop/academics/university-of-warwick/computer-science/3rd-year-modules/cs310-computer-science-project/FINAL/gitrip-mvp/gitrip.db "SELECT id, email, name FROM users WHERE email LIKE ''anon%'' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/astroid/Desktop/academics/university-of-warwick/computer-science/3rd-year-modules/cs310-computer-science-project/FINAL/gitrip-mvp/gitrip.db "SELECT s.id, s.user_id, u.email FROM sessions s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id;")
